Auth.//: Permit the open dev-auth fallback outside the Development environment. Leave false in production; set true only for trusted local/demo runs without Entra.

Encryption.//: AES-256-GCM at-rest encryption for personal-data columns. Enable in production and supply a base64 32-byte key (keep it in Key Vault, not here). Generate: openssl rand -base64 32

Mail.//: Empty AllowedRecipientDomains = allow all (dev). In production list the domains outbound NDA/reminder mail may target.
